title: Inflation cools, market rips, Ripple/MSFT beat regulators, NATO summit, cocktails of youth
description:
(0:00) Addressing the podcast hack

(2:55) Macro picture: inflation cools, what happens to rates, market sentiment, soft landing, tech run-up

(20:34) Consumer sentiment: demand crash coming?

(30:31) BREAKING: Ripple gets big win in SEC case, token rips

(36:33) Lina Khan's losing streak, "spray and pray" strategy, overzealous regulators

(51:08) EV supply/demand mismatch

(1:04:58) Fraught NATO summit, ammo crisis, Sweden joins NATO

(1:18:52) Science Corner: New paper on reversing cellular aging

analysis.summary: The episode discusses the current macroeconomic picture, including inflation and interest rates, as well as various news stories such as Ripple's win in its SEC case and the NATO summit. The hosts also touch on consumer sentiment, the tech industry, and scientific advancements in reversing cellular aging. The overall tone is cautiously optimistic, with the hosts noting the potential for a soft landing and the importance of innovation in driving economic growth.

takeaways.text: Ripple wins big in SEC case

sentiment.notes: The hosts are cautiously optimistic about the economy, but also highlight potential risks and challenges, such as the ammo crisis and regulatory overreach.

notable_moments.description: Ripple's win in SEC case announced
NATO summit and ammo crisis discussed
